constraints.name: warnBelowParAfterReserve
constraints.messageTemplate: After reservation, '{itemName}' will be below par level

constraints.name: warnBelowParAfterConsume
constraints.messageTemplate: After consumption, '{itemName}' will be below par - recommend reorder

constraints.name: blockInsufficientForWaste
constraints.messageTemplate: Cannot record waste of {quantity} {unit} - only {onHand} on hand

constraints.name: warnHighWaste
constraints.messageTemplate: High waste amount ({percentage}% of on-hand) for '{itemName}'

constraints.name: warnLargeNegativeAdjustment
constraints.messageTemplate: Large negative adjustment ({adjustment}) for '{itemName}' - requires verification

constraints.name: warnReleaseExceedsReserved
constraints.messageTemplate: Releasing more ({quantity}) than reserved ({reserved}) - adjusting to reserved amount

value.value: Quantity on hand cannot be negative
Cannot update a deleted inventory item

policies.message: Only managers can create inventory items

policies.name: ManagersCanUpdate
policies.message: Only managers can update inventory items

policies.name: ManagersCanSoftDelete
policies.message: Only managers/admins can delete inventory items
